title: MT❯Forge
content:
### Intelligent. Scalable. Trusted.
MT❯Forge is McCarthy Tétrault’s division for high-volume transactional legal work, powered by AI, scalable legal talent, and our Firm’s expertise. We help our clients handle routine matters with the same confidence they place in our premium offerings. We deliver speed, consistency, and cost predictability without compromising quality.
Led by Sahil Zaman, MT❯Forge offers an AI-first delivery model, modular work packages tailored to client needs, and oversight from top-tier legal professionals. Our approach is client-centric and built on McCarthy Tétrault’s reputation for innovation, trust, and operational excellence.
Some of the services MT❯Forge provides are:

#### Contract review and negotiation
MT❯Forge provides clients with contract review and negotiation services on low and medium complexity contracts using playbooks, contract resources, and customized AI tools.

#### Commercial mortgage preparation
MT❯Forge provides lenders with commercial mortgage preparation services by leveraging precedents, contract resources, and AI for greater efficiency.

#### High-volume capital market issuances
MT❯Forge supports capital markets issuers in their high-volume issuances by automating document preparation, review, and filings.

#### Small-cap M&A transactions
MT❯Forge handles small capitalization M&A transactions using playbooks, contract resources, AI, and our expertise.
To learn more about how MT❯Forge can support your business, contact Sahil Zaman.
- Sahil Zaman Partner | President, MT❯Forge Toronto +1 416-601-8163 szaman@mccarthy.ca
Partner | President, MT❯Forge
- McCarthy Tétrault Launches MT❯Forge to reimagine Legal Service Delivery January 14, 2026
